constraint.name: ca_stocks_lineasconteos_traza_users_last_nick
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (last_nick) REFERENCES users (nick) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_stocks_lineasconteos_traza_users_nick
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (nick) REFERENCES users (nick) ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_traza_lineasconteos
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (idlinea) REFERENCES stocks_lineasconteos (idlinea) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_traza_lineasconteos_conteos
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (idconteo) REFERENCES stocks_conteos (idconteo) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE

constraint.name: ca_traza_lineasconteos_lotes
constraint.type: FOREIGN KEY (idlote) REFERENCES productos_lotes (idlote) ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
